channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Intel May Have an Answer to AMD’s Most Powerful Gaming CPUs
item.description: The Intel and AMD CPU rivalry is getting exciting again.

item.title: « Invitation à tester un nouveau produit » Amazon : attention à cette arnaque qui refait surface
item.description: Une arnaque déjà connue des autorités refait surface en France. Certains reçoivent des lettres mystérieuses provenant soi-disant d'Amazon. Il s'agit en réalité d'une arnaque.

item.title: Boulanger déstocke la Garmin Vivoactive 5 à -46%, une montre taillée pour le sport qui rivalise encore avec la nouvelle Vivoactive 6
item.description: La Garmin Vivoactive 5 est une montre sportive polyvalente légère lancée à 299,99 euros en 2023, que l'on retrouve à 159,99 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: Kia EV1 : voici la future rivale de la Renault Twingo électrique à moins de 20 000 €
item.description: Après avoir dévoilé le petit SUV EV2, Kia descend encore en gamme avec l’EV1. Cette citadine, qui arrivera en 2027, constituera le ticket d’entrée des modèles électriques Kia avec un prix de base qui devrait glisser sous les 20 000 €.

item.title: The New ‘Sunrise on the Reaping’ Trailer Is Ready for Revolution
item.description: 'Hunger Games' goes back into the past again, this time to explore the spark that set Haymitch Abernathy against the Capitol's cruel contests.

item.title: Pragmata is just OK, but it could’ve been great
item.description: Over the last few years, Capcom has done an exceptional job of solidifying its lineup of big, long-running franchises. The likes of Monster Hunter, Resident Evil, and Street Fighter have all been on strong and consistent runs, an impressive thing given the current strain of uncertainty that runs through the games industry. And now the […]

item.title: Secretlab is launching its first Diablo desk, with a design that 'traces the infernal history' of the series
item.description: Secretlab is launching a new Diablo-inspired desk in time for the latest game's next DLC.

item.title: Pragmata’s blend of puzzles, hacking, and combat makes for some of the best space action I’ve ever experienced
item.description: Hacking and combat combine beautifully in Pragmata, making for a satisfying and spectacular space action game

item.title: Jusqu’à 8 Gb/s + box Wi-Fi 7 : la solution B&You pour booster sa connexion sans se ruiner [Sponso]
item.description: Avoir une bonne connexion Internet à domicile n’est plus un luxe. B&You propose en ce moment la fibre à ultra haut débit pour à peine 25,99 euros par mois et sans engagement.

item.title: Hack at Anodot leaves over a dozen breached companies facing extortion
item.description: The data breach at Anodot, which affects customers like Rockstar Games, is the latest hack aimed at stealing data from a large number of corporate giants.

item.title: 'Building the Superdome, a 15-fan PC side panel': YouTuber makes giant fan that looks amazing — and drops temperature by 20C
item.description: A YouTuber created a giant fan comprising of 15 individual 120mm case fans — and it somehow works really well.

item.title: SteamGPT : Valve travaille aussi sur son propre ChatGPT, mais vous ne pourrez pas lui parler
item.description: Des lignes de code découvertes dans Steam mentionnent un outil IA nommé « SteamGPT ». Valve, qui n'a jamais cédé à la mode des chatbots, semble viser bien plus stratégique.

item.title: No, you don't need a new turntable this Record Store Day, just use this cheap extra to clean your vinyl
item.description: Take it from me: a fancy record player won't improve how your vinyl sounds if you haven't tried this cheap extra first

item.title: Honor envoie ses deux robots courir un marathon
item.description: « Lightning » et « Energetic Boy », deux robots humanoïdes fabriqués par Honor, vont participer au marathon de Beijing Yizhuang en Chine.

item.title: Two suspects have been arrested for allegedly shooting at Sam Altman's house
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's house may have been the target of a second attack after San Francisco Police Department arrested two suspects for a reported shooting in the Russian Hill neighborhood. The SFPD said in a press release that police officers responded to a "suspicious occurrence of possible shots fired" at around 5:56 AM ET / 2:56 AM PT on Sunday, April 12. SFPD's Special Investigation Division took over the case and have since detained both 25-year-old Amanda Tom and 23-year-old Muhamad Tarik Hussein, seizing three firearms in the process with the help of a warrant. The two suspects were ...

item.title: Hackers use Claude and ChatGPT in 'a significant evolution in offensive capability' to breach government agencies, leak hundreds of millions of citizen records
item.description: Nine Mexican government agencies targeted by a single attacker with two AI tools.

item.title: Plus sobres et moins chères : ces nouvelles voitures hybrides chinoises qui rêvent de détrôner Toyota en Europe
item.description: Les constructeurs chinois ne se cantonnent pas à l'électrique. Ils misent énormément aussi sur les moteurs hybrides, avec des technologies qui n'ont rien à voir avec celles de Toyota. BYD ou encore Chery ou Geely annoncent des consommations de l'ordre de 2 l/100 km. Et ces moteurs arrivent en Europe.

item.title: Cet immense TV OLED Samsung de 77 pouces et 144 Hz voit son prix divisé par 2
item.description: Avec sa dalle OLED massive, le TV 4K Samsung TQ77S90F devrait combler les cinéphiles comme les gamers. Y compris celles et ceux qui n'ont pas un gros budget, puisque ce modèle est en ce moment proposé à 1 614 euros au lieu de 3 490 euros chez Ubaldi.

item.title: Proton VPN promises better stability for Linux users with latest app update
item.description: Proton VPN has officially launched the stable version of its Linux CLI app, promising users stronger stability, advanced terminal tools, and smoother navigation without the need for a GUI.

item.title: New BBC series Mint releases crushing trailer for 'unconventional' crime drama — and I've never been more sat
item.description: New eight-part crime drama Mint comes to BBC and BBC iPlayer from March 20 — and the first trailer is finally giving away its secrets.

item.title: Comment cette extension Chrome pourrait changer votre manière de naviguer sur Internet
item.description: L’extension Charles pour Google Chrome a comme objectif de réduire notre dépendance aux services américains. Elle offre au total quatre niveaux de blocage, du plus doux au plus radical, tout en proposant des alternatives européennes.

item.title: The First Trailer for ‘The Boroughs’ Gives Seniors Their Own ‘Stranger Things’
item.description: A retirement community hides monsters and wonder in a new look at the Duffer Brothers-produced series.

item.title: You Should Be More Freaked Out by Shingles
item.description: The viral infection leaves millions with chronic pain, increased stroke risk, and lifelong nerve damage—yet vaccination rates remain dangerously low.

item.title: SwitchBot’s button-pressing robot is now available with a rechargeable battery
item.description: SwitchBot is introducing a new version of the tiny button-pressing robot that helped launch the company a decade ago. The functionality of the new SwitchBot Bot is exactly the same as the original that the company will continue to sell, but comes with a rechargeable battery instead of a disposable one. The SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable […]

item.title: Can Puck reinvent the news business for the influencer age?
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Sarah Personette, CEO of Puck, which is a fancy new media company that’s been around for just about five years now. Puck hires big stars and gives them newsletters that are all mostly part of a subscription bundle. These newsletters are often must-reads in their categories — everyone in Hollywood reads […]

item.title: Chase Sapphire’s newest perk isn’t points or lounge access. It’s dinner on stage at the Grand Ole Opry
item.description: The financial services giant is using exclusivity and buzz to redefine what premium credit cards offer. For years, premium credit cards competed on points, perks, and airport lounge access. Now, the battleground is shifting toward something less tangible but arguably more powerful: experiences.

item.title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping trailer teases Haymitchs colorful Quarter Quell
item.description: Joseph Zada stars as Haymitch Abernathy in this "Hunger Games" prequel, in theaters November 20.

item.title: BYD’s Fastest-Charging Car in the World Is Astonishing—in Good and Bad Ways
item.description: WIRED witnessed the game-changing Denza Z9 GT charge its battery in just 9 minutes. But the pricing for BYD's premium brand looks like a huge mistake.

item.title: The latest Gallup poll reveals these 3 findings on AI in the American workplace
item.description: The quarterly poll of U.S. workers was conducted in February 2026. More American workers are experimenting with artificial intelligence in their jobs, but skepticism is still widespread.New Gallup polling finds that while more employees are using AI frequently in their work, there’s been an uptick in alarm that new technologies will replace their jobs. Many workers who are not using AI say they prefer to work without it, have ethical oppositions to the technology or worry about data privacy.The poll, conducted in February, points to a divergence in how AI is reshaping American workplaces. Some...

item.title: More LG OLED TV users are experiencing power cycling issues caused by bright flashes — and it's not just older models
item.description: More LG OLED users are reporting power cycling issues caused by bright flashes on Reddit...

item.title: RED by SFR condamné à 10 millions d’euros d’amende pour ses fausses promesses de prix garantis « à vie »
item.description: C'est un feuilleton judiciaire qui connaît enfin un dénouement après deux plaintes et cinq ans de procédure. La justice vient de faire condamner RED by SFR à une lourde amende pour pratiques commerciales trompeuses. En cause : des forfaits au prix garanti à vie mais qui ont rapidement augmenté.

item.title: I scaled mental health products for millions
item.description: My advice for building a business that doesn’t break you. Entrepreneurship is improperly branded. From the outside, it appears like autonomy, upside, and ambition realized. From the inside, it too often feels like anxiety, uncertainty, and sleepless nights.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly building an AI clone to replace him in meetings
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg could soon have an AI clone of himself to interact with and provide feedback to employees, according to a report from the Financial Times. Sources tell the outlet that Meta is training the AI avatar on Zuckerberg's image and voice, along with his mannerisms, tone, and public statements, "so that employees […]

item.title: What is Sky Quarry? Little-known energy stock has skyrocketed 266% during the Strait of Hormuz drama
item.description: The war in Iran has stoked worries about material and commodities shortages, with some domestic producers seeing an astounding rally this year. Dig in: A stock you’ve probably never heard of is shooting for the stars.

item.title: Huawei Pura X Max might usher the era of wide foldable phones
item.description: Huawei has a teaser video for its upcoming wide foldable phone, the Huawei Pura X Max.

item.title: Telegram CEO urges Russians to 'stock up' on VPNs as the platform gets an anti-censorship boost
item.description: With Telegram connectivity in Russia dropping to just 5% last Friday, Pavel Durov has announced a major upgrade to the app's anti-censorship protocols. However, reliable VPNs remain a vital lifeline for users. Here's everything we know.

item.title: Data activation and Newton’s first law
item.description: Business inertia and data are intricately connected. My father has a PhD in mechanical social engineering and, among many things, designed cooling systems for nuclear reactors. From him, I inherited a restless curiosity about how the world works and a deep respect for the laws of science. Over the years, I’ve found that many of the principles governing physical objects translate perfectly to business....

item.title: Un PDF suffit à pirater votre PC avec Acrobat Reader, Adobe réagit… 4 mois plus tard
item.description: Adobe a mis quatre mois à corriger une faille critique d'Acrobat Reader. Pendant ce temps, des attaquants l'exploitaient déjà pour voler vos données.

item.title: Ce chargeur rapide 100W pouvant accueillir jusqu’à 5 appareils simultanément est en promo à -30%, pratique pour les voyages
item.description: Le chargeur Ugreen Nexode 100W 5 ports est très pratique pour brancher plusieurs appareils en même temps, que vous pouvez retrouver pour 35,99 euros au lieu de 51,24 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Slate Auto raises $650M to fund its affordable EV truck plans
item.description: Slate Auto's latest funding round was led by existing investor TWG Global, a firm run by LA Dodgers owner Mark Walter.

item.title: La corbeille débarque dans Google Messages, voici comment l’utiliser
item.description: Terminées les conversations effacées par erreur sur Google Messages. L'application se dote d'une corbeille qui vous laisse le temps de les récupérer.

item.title: The productivity question AI forces us to ask
item.description: Build with AI without losing the plot. We have a story we tell ourselves about productivity tools. The story goes like this: The more efficient we become, the more time we free up, and the more we can relax. We’ve been telling this story since the dishwasher. We’ve never once been right.
